summary: Frontend-only validation completed for redesigned client and business landing pages on preview URL. Core CTAs, navigation, tabs, role selector, responsive behavior, and visual hierarchy were verified with no blocking regressions.

integration_issues.issue: Preview logs show repeated net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED during resource/API loading, and establishment results remained empty in this environment. This aligns with provided context that establishment query may fail due to fictitious endpoint.

action_items: Optional: stabilize preview environment resource resolution (ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED) to validate populated establishment cards visually.
Optional: add deterministic testid around business sandbox section container to simplify CTA-to-sandbox viewport assertions in automated checks.
critical_code_review_comments: All key interactive elements used in landing validation expose testID/testid attributes needed for UI automation.
Landing style system consistently applies preserved green palette and typography tokens via landing-tokens.
No syntax/render blockers observed in altered landing components during runtime smoke and interaction checks.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on http://localhost:8082 and /para-estabelecimentos with desktop 1920x800 and mobile 390x800. Verified: CTA cliente -> busca, CTA negócios -> sandbox (scroll moved from y=1607 to y=346), cross-navigation between landings, sandbox tabs, role toggles, and no horizontal overflow on tested breakpoints.
rca of the issue: No functional regression RCA required in this run. Only environment-level unresolved host/resource errors were observed (net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED), with behavior matching the supplied preview-context limitation for establishment query.
